title: Silky Corn Fritters
description: A crispy and tender corn fritter recipe with a silky twist. Perfect for a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, fermented corn, salt, and pepper.
Add water and stir until combined. The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with silky stir-fry sauce for dipping.
Note: If the batter is too thick, add a little more water. If it's too thin, add a little more cornmeal.
